session.user:

1. `uv run ruff check --fix src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_enhance_with_graphite.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_graphite_first_flow.py tests/unit/gateways/gt/fake_ops.py 2>&1`

Report the full output. Do NOT edit any files.
